title: What's New YubiKey 5.8
byline: YubiKey 5.8: Verified Authorization for the New Era of Identity and AI
excerpt: Hardware-backed assurance for verified digital authorization and AI.
content_html:
• Hardware-backed assurance for verified digital authorization and AI.

    In an era where securing human and non-human identities is critical, YubiKey 5.8 strengthens the hardware root of trust—expanding hardware-backed assurance beyond login, enabling verifiable digital actions for the next generation of AI-based workflows.

    Support for cutting-edge use cases: Go beyond authentication to verified authorization. Securely sign digital actions—from document approvals to financial transactions—using hardware-backed trust.

    Trusted AI workflows: Anchor autonomous AI actions in verified human intent. Enable high-assurance, human-in-the-loop approvals for critical workflows.

    Simplified developer integration: Leverage FIDO CTAP 2.3 and developer preview support for WebAuthn extensions to integrate secure, privacy-preserving workflows. 

    Emerging initiatives secured: Expands support for digital identity wallets, verifiable credentials, and Secure Payment Confirmation (SPC), ensuring privacy remains at the core of your digital ecosystem.

    Better user experience: Improve adoption with Persistent PIN User Access Token (PPUAT), making credentials easier to discover in modern authentication flows.

    Enterprise scale: Manage at scale with increased support for up to 16 RPIDs, simplifying deployments across development, staging, and production environments.

    What this means for you

    Developers & identity builders: Build secure, verified actions as easily as logins. Use familiar standards to integrate signing without complex backend management.

    Security practitioners & leaders: Simplify scaling. Extend phishing-resistant identity beyond access, across multiple identity providers and complex environments, while providing the secure, verifiable approvals necessary for modern, complex environments.

    AI & ecosystem builders: Anchor the future. Use YubiKey 5.8 as the foundational trust anchor for privacy-preserving identity and high-consequence AI authorizations and human-in-the-loop approvals. 

    Which keys are supported

    YubiKey 5.8 is now shipping across the YubiKey product family (YubiKey Bio Series, YubiKey 5 Series, Security Key Series). The YubiKey FIPS Series remains on firmware 5.7.4 to maintain FIPS 140-3 validation. The YubiKey CCN Series will also remain on 5.7.4 while it is currently undergoing final re-certification.

blocks.html_en:
• Hardware-backed assurance for verified digital authorization and AI.

    In an era where securing human and non-human identities is critical, YubiKey 5.8 strengthens the hardware root of trust—expanding hardware-backed assurance beyond login, enabling verifiable digital actions for the next generation of AI-based workflows.

    Support for cutting-edge use cases: Go beyond authentication to verified authorization. Securely sign digital actions—from document approvals to financial transactions—using hardware-backed trust.

    Trusted AI workflows: Anchor autonomous AI actions in verified human intent. Enable high-assurance, human-in-the-loop approvals for critical workflows.

    Simplified developer integration: Leverage FIDO CTAP 2.3 and developer preview support for WebAuthn extensions to integrate secure, privacy-preserving workflows. 

    Emerging initiatives secured: Expands support for digital identity wallets, verifiable credentials, and Secure Payment Confirmation (SPC), ensuring privacy remains at the core of your digital ecosystem.

    Better user experience: Improve adoption with Persistent PIN User Access Token (PPUAT), making credentials easier to discover in modern authentication flows.

    Enterprise scale: Manage at scale with increased support for up to 16 RPIDs, simplifying deployments across development, staging, and production environments.

    What this means for you

    Developers & identity builders: Build secure, verified actions as easily as logins. Use familiar standards to integrate signing without complex backend management.

    Security practitioners & leaders: Simplify scaling. Extend phishing-resistant identity beyond access, across multiple identity providers and complex environments, while providing the secure, verifiable approvals necessary for modern, complex environments.

    AI & ecosystem builders: Anchor the future. Use YubiKey 5.8 as the foundational trust anchor for privacy-preserving identity and high-consequence AI authorizations and human-in-the-loop approvals. 

    Which keys are supported

    YubiKey 5.8 is now shipping across the YubiKey product family (YubiKey Bio Series, YubiKey 5 Series, Security Key Series). The YubiKey FIPS Series remains on firmware 5.7.4 to maintain FIPS 140-3 validation. The YubiKey CCN Series will also remain on 5.7.4 while it is currently undergoing final re-certification.

sentences.en: Hardware-backed assurance for verified digital authorization and AI.
sentences.zh: 为经过验证的数字授权和人工智能提供硬件支持的保证。

sentences.en: In an era where securing human and non-human identities is critical, YubiKey 5.8 strengthens the hardware root of trust—expanding hardware-backed assurance beyond login, enabling verifiable digital actions for the next generation of AI-based workflows.
sentences.zh: 在保护人类和非人类身份至关重要的时代，YubiKey 5.8 强化了硬件信任根——将硬件支持的保证扩展到登录之外，为下一代基于人工智能的工作流程提供可验证的数字操作。

sentences.en: Support for cutting-edge use cases: Go beyond authentication to verified authorization.
sentences.zh: 支持前沿用例：超越身份验证到验证授权。

sentences.en: Securely sign digital actions—from document approvals to financial transactions—using hardware-backed trust.
sentences.zh: 使用硬件支持的信任安全地签署数字操作（从文档审批到金融交易）。

sentences.en: Trusted AI workflows: Anchor autonomous AI actions in verified human intent.
sentences.zh: 可信的人工智能工作流程：将自主人工智能行动锚定在经过验证的人类意图中。

sentences.en: Enable high-assurance, human-in-the-loop approvals for critical workflows.
sentences.zh: 为关键工作流程提供高保证的人机交互批准。

sentences.en: Simplified developer integration: Leverage FIDO CTAP 2.3 and developer preview support for WebAuthn extensions to integrate secure, privacy-preserving workflows.
sentences.zh: 简化的开发人员集成：利用 FIDO CTAP 2.3 和对 WebAuthn 扩展的开发人员预览支持来集成安全、隐私保护的工作流程。

sentences.en: Emerging initiatives secured: Expands support for digital identity wallets, verifiable credentials, and Secure Payment Confirmation (SPC), ensuring privacy remains at the core of your digital ecosystem.
sentences.zh: 确保新兴计划的安全：扩大对数字身份钱包、可验证凭证和安全支付确认 (SPC) 的支持，确保隐私仍然是数字生态系统的核心。

sentences.en: Better user experience: Improve adoption with Persistent PIN User Access Token (PPUAT), making credentials easier to discover in modern authentication flows.
sentences.zh: 更好的用户体验：通过持久 PIN 用户访问令牌 (PPUAT) 提高采用率，使凭证在现代身份验证流程中更容易发现。

sentences.en: Enterprise scale: Manage at scale with increased support for up to 16 RPIDs, simplifying deployments across development, staging, and production environments.
sentences.zh: 企业规模：通过增加对多达 16 个 RPID 的支持来进行大规模管理，从而简化跨开发、登台和生产环境的部署。

sentences.en: What this means for you Developers & identity builders: Build secure, verified actions as easily as logins.
sentences.zh: 这对您意味着什么 开发人员和身份构建者：像登录一样轻松地构建安全、经过验证的操作。

sentences.en: Use familiar standards to integrate signing without complex backend management.
sentences.zh: 使用熟悉的标准集成签名，无需复杂的后端管理。

sentences.en: Security practitioners & leaders: Simplify scaling.
sentences.zh: 安全从业者和领导者：简化扩展。

sentences.en: Extend phishing-resistant identity beyond access, across multiple identity providers and complex environments, while providing the secure, verifiable approvals necessary for modern, complex environments.
sentences.zh: 将防网络钓鱼身份扩展到多个身份提供商和复杂环境的访问之外，同时提供现代复杂环境所需的安全、可验证的批准。

sentences.en: AI & ecosystem builders: Anchor the future.
sentences.zh: 人工智能和生态系统构建者：锚定未来。

sentences.en: Use YubiKey 5.8 as the foundational trust anchor for privacy-preserving identity and high-consequence AI authorizations and human-in-the-loop approvals.
sentences.zh: 使用 YubiKey 5.8 作为隐私保护身份和高后果人工智能授权以及人机交互批准的基础信任锚。

sentences.en: Which keys are supported YubiKey 5.8 is now shipping across the YubiKey product family (YubiKey Bio Series, YubiKey 5 Series, Security Key Series).
sentences.zh: 支持哪些密钥 YubiKey 5.8 现已在 YubiKey 产品系列（YubiKey Bio 系列、YubiKey 5 系列、安全密钥系列）中提供。

sentences.en: The YubiKey FIPS Series remains on firmware 5.7.4 to maintain FIPS 140-3 validation.
sentences.zh: YubiKey FIPS 系列保留固件 5.7.4 以维持 FIPS 140-3 验证。

sentences.en: The YubiKey CCN Series will also remain on 5.7.4 while it is currently undergoing final re-certification.
sentences.zh: YubiKey CCN 系列也将保留在 5.7.4 版本，同时目前正在进行最终的重新认证。

content_html_zh: • 为经过验证的数字授权和人工智能提供硬件支持的保证。 在保护人类和非人类身份至关重要的时代，YubiKey 5.8 强化了硬件信任根——将硬件支持的保证扩展到登录之外，为下一代基于人工智能的工作流程提供可验证的数字操作。 支持前沿用例：超越身份验证到验证授权。 使用硬件支持的信任安全地签署数字操作（从文档审批到金融交易）。 可信的人工智能工作流程：将自主人工智能行动锚定在经过验证的人类意图中。 为关键工作流程提供高保证的人机交互批准。 简化的开发人员集成：利用 FIDO CTAP 2.3 和对 WebAuthn 扩展的开发人员预览支持来集成安全、隐私保护的工作流程。 确保新兴计划的安全：扩大对数字身份钱包、可验证凭证和安全支付确认 (SPC) 的支持，确保隐私仍然是数字生态系统的核心。 更好的用户体验：通过持久 PIN 用户访问令牌 (PPUAT) 提高采用率，使凭证在现代身份验证流程中更容易发现。 企业规模：通过增加对多达 16 个 RPID 的支持来进行大规模管理，从而简化跨开发、登台和生产环境的部署。 这对您意味着什么 开发人员和身份构建者：像登录一样轻松地构建安全、经过验证的操作。 使用熟悉的标准集成签名，无需复杂的后端管理。 安全从业者和领导者：简化扩展。 将防网络钓鱼身份扩展到多个身份提供商和复杂环境的访问之外，同时提供现代复杂环境所需的安全、可验证的批准。 人工智能和生态系统构建者：锚定未来。 使用 YubiKey 5.8 作为隐私保护身份和高后果人工智能授权以及人机交互批准的基础信任锚。 支持哪些密钥 YubiKey 5.8 现已在 YubiKey 产品系列（YubiKey Bio 系列、YubiKey 5 系列、安全密钥系列）中提供。 YubiKey FIPS 系列保留固件 5.7.4 以维持 FIPS 140-3 验证。 YubiKey CCN 系列也将保留在 5.7.4 版本，同时目前正在进行最终的重新认证。 进一步探索 新闻稿 阅读更多 博客 阅读更多 网络研讨会 立即观看 数据表 阅读更多
